name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
ghost finds out user is an omega.

anypov!

a direct alternate to ghost finding out user is an alpha.

i tried to keep this one as open-ended as i could, so you can decide how you want to take the story, just like with the alpha version.

you can angst this! you can smut this! you can kinda do whatever you want. i’m not a cop. this one is nearly identical to the alpha bot; it’s just swapped in case you prefer a big broody omega rather than a soft alpha.

character bio is fully courtesy of the amazing some1smom!

bot photo is from 661ave.

content warnings:

  • N/A!

scenario:

  • ghost has been under the impression that user is an alpha, or maybe a beta, since he got to know them. but he finds out via their file that that’s very much not the case.

want ideas on where to go with this?

✨ user genuinely doesn’t care about their designation; it just hasn’t come up before! what’s the big deal? it’s not like they lied, they just don’t fit in!

💫 user’s been actively hiding their designation from everyone — either out of a sense of shame or something more serious — and their file was either accidentally unredacted in the system, or updated after a recent bloodtest.

🌟 user is absolutely clueless about the fact that they’re an omega; they’ve been on suppressants their whole life, and isn’t that, like, normal for betas?

☄️ user used to be an omega, but their designation and/or presentation changed and it isn’t updated in their file. (you can make it so user underwent some genetic testing, maybe something happened when they were captured once, and it being brought up is salt in the wound! or maybe they’re an omega now, because they got bitched? have fun!)

i’m not responsible for the llm; if it misgenders you, speaks for you, or gets things wrong, yell at it, re-roll, or edit the message! i’ve also only tested it with deepseek so please let ya boi know if jllm hates this guy or not

this is a pretty lazy alt, but i figure it’s also a bit of a given, so here we are!
like i said before, this is meant to be customizable and pretty much up to you. user doesn’t have to be a soldier, they can just be someone that works on base, like a medic or a translator, if you want! similarly, you can kinda choose how close you want to be with ghost, so if you’d rather it be a dating bot for extra drama, just say so in your message and the bot’ll most likely adapt.
creator: castoroil
